privacy: Privacy Policy
Privacy Policy for Day's End
Last Updated: January 31, 2026
1. Introduction

Day's End ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application.
2. Information We Collect
Account Information

When you create an account, we collect:
• Username
• Email address (via Firebase Authentication)
• User ID (automatically generated)
Demographic Information

You may optionally provide:
• Country of residence
• Age group
• Gender

This information helps us understand our global user base and is used for analytics purposes.
Event Activity Data

When you log events, we collect:
• Event names and IDs
• Timestamps of when events are logged
• Your country (from demographic settings) for event analytics
• Daily log counts and streak information
Device Information

We automatically collect:
• Device type and operating system
• FCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging) tokens for push notifications
• App version and usage statistics
Comments (Premium Feature)
If you have a premium subscription and comment on events, we store your comments along with your user ID and timestamp.
3. How We Use Your Information

We use the collected information to:

• Provide and maintain the Day's End service
• Track your event logs and streaks
• Display trending global events and statistics
• Send you notifications about:
  - Daily reminders to log events
  - Event milestones you're subscribed to
  - System announcements
• Process your premium subscription through RevenueCat
• Analyze app usage to improve our services
• Provide an ad-free experience for premium users
• Enable community features like event comments
4. Data Storage and Security
Firebase and Google Cloud

Your data is stored securely using Firebase services (Firestore, Authentication, Cloud Functions) which are hosted on Google Cloud Platform. These services comply with industry-standard security practices.
Data Retention
We retain your data for as long as your account is active. You can request account deletion at any time by contacting us.
Security Measures

We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data, including:
• Encrypted data transmission (HTTPS/TLS)
• Secure Firebase authentication
• Regular security updates
• Access controls and authentication
5. Third-Party Services

We use the following third-party services that may collect information:

• Firebase (Google): Authentication, database, cloud functions, and analytics
• RevenueCat: Subscription management and payment processing
• Google AdMob: Advertising for free users

Each service has its own privacy policy:
• Firebase Privacy Policy: https://firebase.google.com/support/privacy
• RevenueCat Privacy Policy: https://www.revenuecat.com/privacy
• Google AdMob Privacy Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy
6. Notifications

We send push notifications to enhance your experience:

• Daily Reminders: Random times between 9am-9pm UTC to encourage event logging
• Event Milestones: Notifications when events you've logged reach significant thresholds (1k, 10k, 50k, 100k, 500k, 1M logs)
• System Announcements: Important app updates

You can control notification preferences in the app settings. We store your FCM token securely to enable push notifications.
7. Event Subscriptions

When you log an event, you are automatically subscribed to receive milestone notifications for that event. You can manage your subscriptions through the app. We track:
• Which events you've logged
• Your subscription status for each event
• Whether subscriptions are active or inactive
8. Premium Subscriptions

Premium subscriptions are processed through RevenueCat and your device's payment system (App Store or Google Play). We do not store your payment information directly. We only receive:
• Subscription status (active/expired/canceled)
• Subscription type (weekly/monthly)
• Expiration dates

Your payment details are handled exclusively by Apple or Google.
9. Data Sharing and Disclosure

We do NOT sell your personal information. We may share data only in these circumstances:

• With Service Providers: Firebase, RevenueCat, and AdMob as necessary to provide our services
• For Legal Compliance: If required by law or to protect our rights
• Aggregated Data: We may share anonymized, aggregated statistics about events and user activity

Public Information:
• Event names and log counts are visible to all users
• Trending events and statistics are publicly displayed
• Comments you post (premium feature) are visible to other users
10. Children's Privacy

Day's End is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe we have collected information from a child under 13, please contact us immediately.
11. Your Rights

You have the right to:

• Access your personal data
• Correct inaccurate data
• Request deletion of your account and data
• Export your data
• Opt-out of notifications
• Withdraw demographic information
• Cancel your premium subscription

To exercise these rights, contact us at the email below.
12. International Data Transfers
Your data may be transferred to and stored on servers located outside your country. Firebase and Google Cloud operate globally. By using the app, you consent to these transfers.
13. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes through:
• In-app notifications
• Updated "Last Updated" date
• Email notification (if applicable)

Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
14. Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, contact us at:

Email: yarpsports@gmail.com

We will respond to your inquiry within 30 days.
© 2026 Day's End
tos: Terms of Service
Terms of Service
Last Updated: January 31, 2026
1. Acceptance of Terms

By downloading, installing, or using Day's End ("the App"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the App.

These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Day's End ("we", "our", or "us").
2. Description of Service

Day's End is a mobile application that allows users to:

• Log and track events and activities globally
• View trending events and statistics
• Create custom events (Premium feature)
• Comment on events (Premium feature)
• Track personal streaks and achievements
• Receive notifications about events and reminders
• Subscribe to event milestone notifications

We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any feature at any time without prior notice.
3. User Accounts and Registration

To use the App, you must:

• Create an account through Firebase Authentication
• Provide a valid email address
• Be at least 13 years of age
• Provide accurate information

You are responsible for:
• Maintaining the confidentiality of your account
• All activities that occur under your account
• Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized use

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
4. Free and Premium Features

Free Account:
• Unlimited event logs
• Access to basic features
• View trending events and statistics
• Advertisements displayed in the app (including an interstitial ad after each event log)

Premium Subscription Benefits:
• Create custom events for others to log
• Log custom events created by others
• Leave comments on events
• Ad-free experience
• All future premium features

Premium subscriptions are available on a weekly or monthly basis and are processed through your device's app store (Apple App Store or Google Play Store).
5. Subscription Terms
Billing and Renewal
Premium subscriptions automatically renew unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. You will be charged within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period.
Cancellation
You can cancel your subscription at any time through your device's subscription settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. No refunds for partial periods.
Price Changes
We may change subscription prices at any time. Price changes for existing subscribers will be communicated at least 30 days in advance and will apply at the next renewal.
Refunds
All subscription purchases are final. Refund requests must be made through your app store (Apple or Google) and are subject to their refund policies.
6. User Conduct and Content

You agree NOT to:

• Create events with offensive, inappropriate, or harmful content
• Use profanity or hate speech in event names or comments
• Impersonate others or misrepresent your identity
• Spam or abuse the event logging system
• Attempt to manipulate trending events or statistics
• Harass, threaten, or intimidate other users
• Violate any applicable laws or regulations
• Upload malicious code or attempt to hack the App
• Use automated systems (bots) to log events
• Share your account credentials with others

We reserve the right to:
• Remove any content that violates these terms
• Suspend or terminate accounts for violations
• Report illegal activities to appropriate authorities
7. Content Moderation

We use automated filtering to detect offensive content in:
• Event names
• Custom event names (Premium)
• Comments (Premium)

We reserve the right to review, edit, or remove any content at our discretion. Events and comments that violate our guidelines will be deleted, and repeat offenders may have their accounts suspended or terminated.
8. Event Data and Ownership

When you log an event:
• The event name and timestamp become part of our public database
• Event statistics (counts, breakdowns) are visible to all users
• You automatically subscribe to milestone notifications for that event
• Aggregated event data is publicly displayed

Custom Events (Premium):
• You retain ownership of custom event names you create
• By creating a custom event, you grant us a license to display it to all users
• Custom events may be logged by any premium user

Comments (Premium):
• You retain ownership of your comments
• Comments are publicly visible to all users
• We may moderate or remove comments that violate our guidelines
9. Notifications

By using the App, you consent to receive push notifications:

• Daily Reminders: Sent at random times (9am-9pm UTC)
• Event Milestones: When events reach 1k, 10k, 50k, 100k, 500k, or 1M logs
• System Announcements: Important app updates

You can manage notification preferences in the app settings. We store your device FCM token to enable notifications.
10. Intellectual Property

The App, including all content, features, and functionality, is owned by Day's End and is protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

You may not:
• Copy, modify, or distribute the App
• Reverse engineer or decompile the App
• Remove any copyright or proprietary notices
• Use our name, logo, or trademarks without permission
11. Third-Party Services

The App integrates with third-party services:

• Firebase (Google): Backend infrastructure
• RevenueCat: Subscription management
• Google AdMob: Advertising (free users)

Use of these services is subject to their respective terms of service. We are not responsible for third-party service failures or data practices.
12. Disclaimer of Warranties

THE APP IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED.

We do not guarantee that:
• The App will be error-free or uninterrupted
• Defects will be corrected
• The App is free of viruses or harmful components
• Event data and statistics are 100% accurate

You use the App at your own risk.
13. Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, WE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR:

• Any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages
• Loss of profits, data, or goodwill
• Service interruptions or data loss
• Any damages arising from your use of the App

Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid for the App in the past 12 months (if applicable).
14. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Day's End, its affiliates, and service providers from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses (including legal fees) arising from:

• Your use of the App
• Your violation of these Terms
• Your violation of any rights of others
• Content you post or create
15. Data and Privacy
Your use of the App is subject to our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your data.
16. Termination

We may terminate or suspend your account at any time for:
• Violation of these Terms
• Illegal or fraudulent activity
• Extended inactivity
• At our sole discretion

Upon termination:
• Your access to the App will cease immediately
• Your event logs and data may be deleted
• Premium subscription benefits end (no pro-rata refunds)

You may terminate your account at any time by contacting us.
17. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective upon posting in the App or on our website. Your continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.

Material changes will be communicated through:
• In-app notifications
• Email notifications
• Updated "Last Updated" date
18. Governing Law and Disputes

These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of [Your Jurisdiction], without regard to conflict of law principles.

Any disputes shall be resolved through:
1. Good faith negotiation
2. Mediation (if negotiation fails)
3. Binding arbitration (if mediation fails)

You waive any right to a jury trial or to participate in a class action lawsuit.
19. Severability

If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect. Invalid provisions shall be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make them valid and enforceable.
20. Contact Information

For questions about these Terms or the App, contact us at:

Email: yarpsports@gmail.com
Response Time: Within 30 days
© 2026 Day's End

privacy:
Privacy Policy
Last Updated: December 6, 2025
ShopFlow ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application.
1. Information We Collect
Personal Information:
• Name and email address (for account creation)
• Phone number (optional, for account recovery)
• Profile information
• Business information (name, type, currency)

Business Data:
• Product inventory details
• Sales transactions and records
• Purchase and expense information
• Customer and supplier information
• Debt and credit records
• Business notes and reminders
• Milestone and goal data

Technical Data:
• Device information (model, OS version)
• App usage statistics
• Error logs and crash reports
• IP address and location data (for Shop Network)
• Push notification tokens
2. How We Collect Information
We collect information through:

• Direct input when you create an account or enter data
• Automatic collection via Firebase Analytics
• Camera access for receipt scanning (with permission)
• Location services for Shop Network (with permission)
• Notification preferences you set
• Third-party authentication (Google Sign-In)
3. How We Use Your Information
We use collected information to:

Provide Services:
• Operate and maintain the App
• Process and store your business data
• Generate analytics and insights
• Send notifications and reminders

Improve Services:
• Analyze usage patterns
• Fix bugs and improve performance
• Develop new features
• Personalize your experience

AI Features:
• Process receipt images with Google Gemini AI
• Generate business insights and recommendations
• Provide smart milestone suggestions
• Assist with note generation

Account Management:
• Verify your identity
• Process subscription payments
• Provide customer support
• Send important updates
4. Data Storage and Security
Storage:
• Data is stored on Google Firebase servers
• Servers are located in secure data centers
• Data is automatically backed up
• Business data is isolated per account

Security Measures:
• End-to-end encryption for data in transit (TLS/SSL)
• Encryption at rest using Firebase security
• Secure authentication with Firebase Auth
• Regular security audits and updates
• Access controls and permissions

Note: No method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure. While we implement industry-standard security measures, we cannot guarantee absolute security.
5. Data Sharing and Disclosure
We DO NOT sell your data to third parties.

We share limited data with:

Service Providers:
• Firebase (Google) - Data storage, authentication, analytics
• Google Gemini AI - AI-powered features
• RevenueCat - Subscription management
• Cloud messaging services - Push notifications

Legal Requirements:
We may disclose information if required by law, subpoena, or to:
• Comply with legal obligations
• Protect our rights and property
• Prevent fraud or security issues
• Protect user safety

Shop Network:
• Business name and location (approximate)
• Product catalog (if you choose to share)
• No personal or financial data is shared
6. AI and Data Processing
Google Gemini AI:
• Receipt images are sent to Google Gemini for processing
• Images are processed to extract transaction data
• We do not permanently store receipt images
• Google's AI terms and privacy policies apply
• You can opt out by not using AI features

Business Insights:
• Your business data is analyzed locally and via AI
• Insights are generated based on your data only
• No data is shared with other users for insights
7. Your Data Rights
You have the right to:

Access:
• View all your personal and business data
• Request a copy of your data

Modify:
• Update your profile information
• Correct inaccurate data
• Edit business records

Export:
• Export your data in CSV or PDF format (Premium)
• Download business reports

Delete:
• Delete individual records
• Delete entire businesses
• Request complete account deletion
• Note: Deletion is permanent and cannot be undone

Control:
• Manage notification preferences
• Control app permissions (camera, location)
• Opt out of analytics
• Cancel subscription anytime
8. Permissions and Access
The App requests the following permissions:

Required:
• Internet - Sync data and use cloud features
• Storage - Save exported files and images

Optional:
• Camera - Scan receipts and add product images
• Location - Find nearby businesses in Shop Network
• Notifications - Receive alerts and reminders
• Phone - Optional contact sync for customer records

You can deny permissions, but some features may be limited.
9. Children's Privacy
ShopFlow is not intended for children under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately to delete it.
10. Data Retention
Active Accounts:
• Data is retained as long as your account is active
• Automatic backups for data protection

Deleted Accounts:
• Account data is permanently deleted within 30 days
• Some logs may be retained for legal/security purposes
• Export your data before deletion

Subscription Data:
• Subscription history retained for tax/legal compliance
• Purchase records maintained per app store policies
11. Cookies and Tracking
We use:

• Firebase Analytics - App usage and performance
• Session tokens - Keep you logged in
• Preferences - Remember your settings

We do NOT use:
• Third-party advertising cookies
• Cross-app tracking
• Behavioral advertising
12. International Data Transfers
Your data may be transferred to and stored on servers in countries other than your own. By using ShopFlow, you consent to such transfers. We ensure adequate safeguards are in place for international transfers.
13. Changes to Privacy Policy
We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of material changes via:

• In-app notifications
• Email notifications
• App update notes

The "Last Updated" date will be revised. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
14. Third-Party Links
The App may contain links to third-party websites or services. We are not responsible for their privacy practices. Review their privacy policies before providing any information.
15. Contact Us
For privacy-related questions or requests:

Email: yarpsports@gmail.com
Phone: +254 708589852

We will respond to privacy inquiries within 30 days.
16. Your Consent
By using ShopFlow, you consent to our Privacy Policy and agree to its terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the App.
tos:
Terms of Service
Last Updated: December 6, 2025
1. Acceptance of Terms
By accessing and using ShopFlow ("the App"), you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to these Terms of Service, please do not use the App.
2. Description of Service
ShopFlow is a comprehensive business management application designed for small business owners. The App provides features including:

• Inventory management and tracking
• Sales transaction recording and analytics
• Purchase and expense management
• Customer debt and supplier credit tracking
• AI-powered business insights and analytics
• Receipt scanning using AI technology
• Multi-business management
• Business milestone tracking
• Shop network for business connections
• Smart notifications and reminders
• Data export capabilities (Premium)
3. User Accounts
To use ShopFlow, you must:

• Create an account with accurate information
• Maintain the security of your account credentials
• Be at least 18 years old or have parental consent
• Not share your account with others
• Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use

You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account.
4. Subscription and Payments
Free Plan:
• Access to basic features
• Manage up to 2 businesses
• Standard support

Premium Subscription:
• Unlimited businesses
• Advanced analytics and custom reports
• AI receipt scanning
• Data export (CSV/PDF)
• Priority support
• Team collaboration features

Subscription Terms:
• Subscriptions automatically renew unless canceled
• You can cancel anytime through your device's subscription settings
• Refunds are handled according to the app store's refund policy
• Prices may change with 30 days notice to existing subscribers
5. Data Usage and Storage
Your Data:
• You retain all rights to your business data
• We use Firebase for secure cloud storage
• Data is encrypted in transit and at rest
• We never sell your data to third parties
• You can export or delete your data at any time

AI Features:
• AI features use Google Gemini AI
• Receipt images may be processed for data extraction
• AI-generated insights are recommendations only
• You are responsible for verifying AI-processed data
6. Acceptable Use
You agree NOT to:

• Use the App for any illegal purposes
• Upload malicious code or viruses
• Attempt to hack or compromise the App
• Use the App to harass others
• Violate any intellectual property rights
• Create fake accounts or businesses
• Scrape data from other users
• Interfere with the App's operation
7. Intellectual Property
The App and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by ShopFlow and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. The ShopFlow name, logo, and all related names are trademarks of ShopFlow.
8. Third-Party Services
ShopFlow integrates with third-party services:

• Firebase (Google) - Data storage and authentication
• Google Gemini AI - AI-powered features
• RevenueCat - Subscription management
• Payment processors - In-app purchases

These services have their own terms and privacy policies.
9. Limitation of Liability
ShopFlow is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for:

• Data loss or corruption
• Business decisions made based on App data
• Errors in AI-generated content
• Third-party service failures
• Lost profits or business interruption

You use the App at your own risk. Always maintain independent backups of critical business data.
10. Data Backup and Responsibility
While we automatically backup your data to the cloud:

• You are responsible for maintaining your own backups
• We recommend regular data exports (Premium feature)
• We are not liable for data loss due to service outages
• Account deletion results in permanent data removal
11. Termination
We may terminate or suspend your account if:

• You violate these Terms of Service
• You engage in fraudulent activity
• Required by law
• The App is discontinued

You may terminate your account at any time through the App settings. Upon termination, your data will be deleted within 30 days.
12. Changes to Terms
We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of material changes via:

• In-app notifications
• Email notifications
• App update notes

Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of new terms.
13. Privacy
Your privacy is important to us. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your information.
14. Governing Law
These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Kenya, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
15. Contact Us
If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:

Email: yarpsports@gmail.com
Phone: +254 708589852

privacy: Privacy Policy
Privacy Policy
Last updated: September 2025
Introduction

At narp, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our social connection platform.
Information We Collect
We collect the following types of information:
Profile Information: Name, email, bio, profile picture, interests, location (if provided)
User Content: Posts, messages, comments, and other content you create
Usage Data: How you interact with the app, features used, time spent
Device Information: Device type, operating system, app version
Location Data: Only if you choose to share your location
Communication Data: Messages and interactions with other users
How We Use Your Information
We use your information to:
Provide and improve our services
Connect you with like-minded users based on shared interests
Enable communication features and messaging
Personalize your experience and content recommendations
Ensure platform safety and prevent abuse
Send important notifications about your account
Analyze usage patterns to improve the app
Comply with legal obligations
Information Sharing
We do not sell your personal information. We may share information only in these limited circumstances:
With other users: Profile information and content you choose to make public
Service providers: Third-party services that help us operate the app (with strict data protection agreements)
Legal requirements: When required by law or to protect our rights and users' safety
Business transfers: If our company is acquired or merged (users will be notified)
We never share your private messages or personal data for marketing purposes.
Data Security
We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data:
Encryption of data in transit and at rest
Secure authentication systems
Regular security audits and updates
Access controls limiting who can view your data
Automatic security monitoring
Secure data centers with physical protection
However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure. We strive to protect your data but cannot guarantee absolute security.
Your Rights and Choices
You have the following rights regarding your data:
Your Rights:
Access: Request a copy of your personal data
Correction: Update or correct inaccurate information
Deletion: Request deletion of your account and data
Portability: Download your data in a portable format
Restriction: Limit how we process your data
Objection: Object to certain types of data processing
To exercise these rights, contact us through the app settings or email us at privacy@narp.app.
Data Retention
We retain your data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. Specific retention periods:
Profile data: Until you delete your account
Messages: Until you or the recipient deletes them
Usage data: Up to 2 years for analytics purposes
Support communications: Up to 3 years
When you delete your account, we will delete your personal data within 30 days, except where we're legally required to retain certain information.
Third-Party Services
We use trusted third-party services to operate our platform:
Authentication: Google Sign-In, Firebase Auth
Cloud storage: Firebase/Google Cloud Platform
Analytics: Firebase Analytics (anonymized data)
Push notifications: Firebase Cloud Messaging
Payment processing: Secure payment providers
These services have their own privacy policies and security measures. We ensure all third parties meet our data protection standards.

s Privacy Section
          _buildSection(
            context,
            title:
s Privacy

Our service is not intended for users under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that we have collected personal data from a child under 13, we will delete such information immediately.
Parents who believe their child has provided personal information should contact us immediately.
International Data Transfers

Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own. We ensure that all international transfers comply with applicable data protection laws and include appropriate safeguards to protect your privacy rights.
Changes to This Policy
We may update this privacy policy from time to time. When we make changes:
We will notify you through the app or email
The updated policy will be posted with a new "last updated" date
Continued use of the app after changes means you accept the updated policy
Material changes will require your explicit consent
Contact Us
If you have questions about this privacy policy or our data practices, please contact us:
Contact Information:
Email: privacy@narp.app
In-app: Settings > Help Center > Contact Support
We aim to respond to all privacy inquiries within 30 days
tos: Terms of Service
Terms of Service
Last updated: September 2025
Agreement to Terms

By using narp ("the app," "our service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access or use our service. These Terms apply to all users of the app.
Description of Service
narp is a social connection platform that helps users:
Connect with like-minded individuals based on shared interests
Engage in time-limited conversations to encourage meaningful connections
Share content and express interests through posts
Build authentic relationships through our credit-based system
The service is provided "as is" and we reserve the right to modify or discontinue features at any time.
User Accounts and Responsibilities
When creating an account, you agree to:
Provide accurate and complete information
Maintain the security of your account credentials
Be responsible for all activities under your account
Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access
Use the service only for lawful purposes
Be at least 13 years old (or the minimum age in your jurisdiction)
You are solely responsible for your account and any actions taken through it.
Acceptable Use Policy
You agree NOT to use the service to:
Harass, abuse, or harm others
Share inappropriate, offensive, or illegal content
Impersonate others or create fake profiles
Share personal information of others without consent
Spam or send unsolicited messages
Attempt to hack or compromise the platform
Use the service for commercial purposes without permission
Violate any applicable laws or regulations
Share content that infringes on intellectual property rights
Violations may result in account suspension or termination.
Credits and Payments
Our credit system operates as follows:
Credits are virtual currency used within the app
Credits can be earned through ads or purchased
All credit purchases are final and non-refundable
Credits have no real-world monetary value
We may modify credit pricing or earning methods with notice
Unused credits remain in your account unless you delete it
Credit transactions are processed through secure third-party payment providers
Prices are subject to change. We'll notify users of any pricing changes.
Content and Intellectual Property
User Content:
You retain ownership of content you create
You grant us a license to use, display, and distribute your content within the service
You're responsible for ensuring you have rights to any content you share
We may remove content that violates these Terms
Our Content:
The app, design, and technology are owned by us or our licensors
You may not copy, modify, or reverse engineer our platform
Our trademarks and logos may not be used without permission
We respect intellectual property rights and will respond to valid copyright claims.
Privacy and Data
Your privacy is important to us. Our data practices are governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms. By using the service, you consent to:
Data collection and use as described in our Privacy Policy
Processing of your information to provide the service
Communication from us about your account and the service
Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we handle your information.
Termination
Either party may terminate this agreement:
Your Rights:
You may delete your account at any time through app settings
Termination is effective immediately upon account deletion
Our Rights:
We may suspend or terminate accounts for Terms violations
We may modify or discontinue the service with reasonable notice
We reserve the right to refuse service to anyone
Upon termination:
Your access to the service will cease immediately
Your data will be deleted according to our Privacy Policy
These Terms will remain in effect for applicable provisions
Legal Information
Disclaimers and Limitations:

privacy: Privacy Policy
Privacy Policy
Last Updated: ${DateTime.now().year}
Introduction

Welcome to Sleevr ("we," "our," or "us"). We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring you have a positive experience while using our trivia application. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application.
Information We Collect
We collect information that you provide directly to us when you create an account, play games, or interact with the app:
Account Information: Username, email address (if you choose to create an account)
Profile Information: Avatar selection, country, profile picture (optional)
Game Data: Your game scores, progress, achievements, levels, credits, and gameplay statistics
Device Information: Device type, operating system, unique device identifiers
Usage Data: How you interact with the app, features used, session duration
How We Use Your Information
We use the information we collect to:
Provide and maintain the game services
Track your progress and save your game data
Enable multiplayer features and matchmaking
Personalize your gaming experience
Send you notifications about your game activity (if enabled)
Improve and optimize the app
Prevent fraud and ensure security
Comply with legal obligations
Data Storage and Security
We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information:
Local Storage: Some data is stored locally on your device
Cloud Storage: When you create an account, your data is securely stored using Firebase Cloud services
Encryption: We use industry-standard encryption for data transmission
Access Controls: Limited access to personal information on a need-to-know basis
Data Sharing and Disclosure
We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information in the following circumstances:
With Your Consent: When you explicitly agree to share information
Service Providers: With trusted third-party services that help us operate the app (e.g., Firebase, cloud storage)
Multiplayer Features: Your username, avatar, and country may be visible to other players in multiplayer modes
Legal Requirements: When required by law or to protect rights and safety
Third-Party Services
Our app uses third-party services that may collect information:
Firebase (Google): Authentication, database, and cloud storage
Google Play Services / Apple Services: In-app services and analytics
Ad Providers: If you choose to watch ads for rewards (anonymized data)
Your Rights and Choices (GDPR)
As a user in the European Union, you have the following rights under GDPR:
Right of Access: Request a copy of your personal information
Right to Rectification: Update or correct your information in the app settings
Right to Erasure ("Right to be Forgotten"): Request deletion of your account and associated data
Right to Restriction of Processing: Request that we limit how we use your data
Right to Data Portability: Request your data in a portable, machine-readable format
Right to Object: Object to processing of your data for certain purposes
Right to Withdraw Consent: Withdraw consent at any time where we rely on consent
Right to Lodge a Complaint: File a complaint with your local data protection authority
How to Delete Your Data

You can delete your account and all associated data directly in the app — no need to email us. Go to your Player Stats screen and tap "Delete My Data" at the bottom, or go to Settings > Account and tap "Delete account & data". This will permanently erase your player profile, game history, achievements, and account credentials. Multiplayer game records will be anonymized (your name replaced with "Deleted User"). This action cannot be undone.
Children's Privacy (GDPR & Age Requirements)

Our app is suitable for users of all ages. Under GDPR, we require parental consent for users under 16 years old. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the applicable age without parental consent. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us, and we will take steps to delete such information within 30 days.
Legal Basis for Processing (GDPR)
Under GDPR, we process your personal data based on the following legal grounds:
Consent: When you provide explicit consent (e.g., creating an account, uploading profile pictures)
Contractual Necessity: To provide the game services you requested
Legitimate Interests: To improve our services, prevent fraud, and ensure security
Legal Obligations: To comply with applicable laws and regulations
International Data Transfers

Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside the European Economic Area (EEA), including the United States where our cloud service providers (Firebase/Google Cloud) operate. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place through:
Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission
Adequacy decisions where applicable
Other legally approved transfer mechanisms
Data Retention

We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services. If you request account deletion using the in-app feature, your data is deleted immediately (within 24 hours), except where required to retain it for legal purposes. Multiplayer game records involving other players are anonymized rather than deleted.
AI-Generated Content

Please note that trivia questions and educational content in our app are generated using AI technology. While we strive for accuracy, some content may contain inaccuracies or be outdated. We encourage users to verify information independently.
Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy in the app and updating the "Last Updated" date. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.
Contact Us & Data Protection Officer
If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, our data practices, or wish to exercise your GDPR rights, please contact us at:
Email: privacy@sleevr.app
Data Protection Officer: dpo@sleevr.app
In-App: Use the feedback option in Settings
EU Representative: [To be appointed if required under GDPR Article 27]
Supervisory Authority

If you are not satisfied with our response to your privacy concerns, you have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection supervisory authority. You can find your local authority at: https://edpb.europa.eu/about-edpb/board/members_en
By using Sleevr, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.
tos: Terms of Service
Terms of Service
Last Updated: ${DateTime.now().year}
Agreement to Terms

Welcome to Sleevr! These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Sleevr mobile application. By downloading, installing, or using our app, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the app.
Eligibility

You must be at least 13 years old to create an account and use our services. Users under 13 may use the app without creating an account, but should do so under parental supervision. By using the app, you represent that you meet these age requirements.
Account Registration
While you can play Sleevr without an account, creating an account enables cloud sync and additional features:
You agree to provide accurate and complete information
You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account
You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access
You may not share your account with others
You may not create multiple accounts to gain unfair advantages
Game Rules and Fair Play
When using Sleevr, you agree to:
Play fairly and not use any cheats, hacks, or exploits
Not manipulate game mechanics or systems
Not use automated tools or bots to play games
Respect other players in multiplayer modes
Not engage in harassment, offensive language, or inappropriate behavior
Not attempt to gain unfair advantages over other players
Credits and Virtual Items
Sleevr uses a virtual currency system called "Credits":
Credits are earned through gameplay, achievements, and leveling up
Credits can be used for in-game features like extra lives or continues
Credits have no real-world monetary value
Credits cannot be exchanged for cash or transferred to other users
We reserve the right to adjust credit values or economy at any time
You may delete your account at any time via the Profile screen or Settings > Account. All credits, progress, and data will be permanently deleted.
AI-Generated Content
Important notice about our content:
Trivia questions and educational content are generated using AI
While we strive for accuracy, content may contain errors or be outdated
We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any content
You should not rely solely on app content for critical decisions
We are not liable for any inaccuracies in AI-generated content
Users are encouraged to verify information independently
Image Credits
Images used in this app, including those in the Guess the Country feature, are sourced as follows:
Images may be AI-generated using tools such as DALL·E or similar services
Images may be sourced from Wikimedia Commons under free-use licences (CC0, CC BY, CC BY-SA, or equivalent)
We make reasonable efforts to use only images that are freely available for use
If you believe an image has been used incorrectly or without proper licence, please contact us and we will review and remove it promptly
User Content and Conduct
If you upload content (profile pictures, custom names):
You retain ownership of your content
You grant us a license to use, store, and display your content
Content must not violate any laws or third-party rights
Content must not be offensive, inappropriate, or harmful
We reserve the right to remove any content that violates these Terms
We may moderate usernames and profile pictures
Intellectual Property
All content in the app, including design, graphics, code, and logos, is owned by us or our licensors:
You may not copy, modify, or distribute any app content
You may not reverse engineer or decompile the app
You may not use our trademarks without permission
We grant you a limited, non-exclusive license to use the app
This license is revocable and terminates if you violate these Terms
Privacy and Data Collection

Your privacy is important to us. Our use of your data is governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms. By using the app, you consent to our data practices as described in the Privacy Policy.
Advertisements
Our app may display advertisements or offer the option to watch ads for rewards:
Ads are provided by third-party networks
We are not responsible for the content of ads
Ad availability may vary and is not guaranteed
You may choose to watch ads for in-game benefits
Termination
We may terminate or suspend your account if:
You violate these Terms of Service
You engage in fraudulent or illegal activity
You abuse or manipulate game systems
You harass or harm other users
We discontinue the service
Disclaimers and Limitations of Liability
THE APP IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND:
We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service
We are not responsible for lost progress or data
We are not liable for any damages arising from app use
We do not guarantee the accuracy of game content
Maximum liability is limited to the amount you paid us (if any)
Some jurisdictions do not allow these limitations
Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of significant changes by updating the "Last Updated" date and/or through in-app notifications. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
Indemnification
You agree to indemnify and hold us harmless from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your use of the app, violation of these Terms, or violation of any rights of another person or entity.
Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the European Union and its member states, without regard to conflict of law principles. For users located in the EU, any disputes will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in your country of residence, as required by EU consumer protection laws.
Contact Information
If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us:
Email: yarpsports@gmail.com
In-App: Use the feedback option in Settings
By using Sleevr, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
